feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: piggy
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: hackify
entry.content: One end-to-end dev workflow for every task — feature, bug fix, refactor, redesign, debug, or research. Replaces multi-skill ceremony with a single per-task markdown work-doc that captures spec, plan, progress, review, and post-mortem in one file.

entry.title: prompt-pocket
entry.content: Cross-agent prompt pocket: remember your most-used prompts and pick one to run; auto-scans Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode sessions to record prompts repeated 7+ times. Forged by Agent Path Forge.

entry.title: feynman-tutor
entry.content: Teach any concept quickly and durably using the Feynman technique, with spaced-repetition review, persistent learning notes, and a reverse-Feynman mode where you teach the tutor.

entry.title: claude-teacher
entry.content: The most attentive AI tutor — teaches any subject by guiding, tracks knowledge gaps, quizzes with spaced repetition, and adapts to your level

entry.title: tempo
entry.content: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entry.title: cdp
entry.content: Structured Demolition Protocol for iteratively hardening any project specification through onboarding, critique, and integration cycles.

entry.title: narwhal
entry.content: Local-first SEO & GEO/LLMO (AI-search) auditing for pages and sites: technical SEO, content/E-E-A-T, schema.org JSON-LD, and citability for AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews).

entry.title: cccp
entry.content: CCCP — Claude-to-Claude Communication Protocol. Live chat, presence, and file sharing between Claude agents across machines and accounts.

entry.title: bear-research
entry.content: 学术科研文献检索技能集。五个独立技能，底层均走真实学术检索（scimaster-cli），绝不编造引用。

entry.title: ai-docs-scraper
entry.content: Scrape official documentation sites into clean, cited Markdown context for AI coding agents. No API key required, SSRF-safe, prompt-injection aware.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: tripwire
entry.content: Flight recorder for AI browser agents — records console, network, and repro steps while Claude browses; saves rich bug reports when something breaks.

entry.title: init-claude
entry.content: Generate and maintain a lean, project-specific CLAUDE.md: analyze an existing codebase (verify facts, merge without clobbering) or interview for a new one, with shared behavioral rules kept importable to avoid drift across repos.

entry.title: async-codex-mcp
entry.content: Expose async Codex MCP profile tools to Claude Code.

entry.title: project-socrates
entry.content: A curated collection of meta-skills for thinking more clearly with AI agents.

entry.title: inertbox
entry.content: Adds Claude Code context for INERTBOX wrapped pasted text, carrying source labels and hash-check results without replacing the prompt.

entry.title: avqn-dev
entry.content: Backbone du dev continu AVQN : skills brainstorm-issue / dev / apercu / new-project + superpowers vendorisées. Deux modes (interactif, routine) partageant un cœur d'implémentation jusqu'au FF merge main.

entry.title: agent-brain
entry.content: Agent-first project/ticket/task tracking: commits auto-record as tasks (hooks), decisions are remembered and recalled (RAG), a read-only board mirrors it all. Bundles the MCP tool surface, lifecycle hooks, and the project-tracker skill.

entry.title: sessions
entry.content: List past Claude Code sessions for the current project.

entry.title: fable-conductor
entry.content: Hybrid model-tiering: Fable as supervisor, Sonnet/Haiku as workers, with self-reflection.

entry.title: usage-dashboard
entry.content: Launch a local web dashboard of your Claude Code / Codex token usage: cost, cache hit-rate, live 5-hour block, and per-project/session breakdown.

entry.title: weekly-report
entry.content: Aggregate git commits, Claude Code session activity, and manual work logs across projects into a per-project weekly report.

entry.title: sf-doc-search
entry.content: Retrieve clean Salesforce documentation (dev docs, Help, Trailhead, release notes) without shadow-DOM/render friction.

entry.title: skim
entry.content: Operate Skim's local-first crawler and research workspace.

entry.title: cognitum-mcp
entry.content: Cognitum MCP server — Seed catalog, CRM leads, order status, support contact, security verification, fleet status, and docs search via https://cognitum.one/mcpSse

entry.title: skills
entry.content: A small collection of agent skills for implementation workflows.

entry.title: deep-solve
entry.content: Delegate a hard self-contained problem to a deterministic solve→review convergence loop (delegating-hard-problems + review-to-convergence, automated end-to-end)

entry.title: altairs-agent-dev-kit
entry.content: AI エージェント開発標準 kit: skills / rules / hooks / agents を任意リポジトリへ

entry.title: mantis-ta
entry.content: Composable technical analysis and strategy engine in pure Rust

entry.title: my-skills
entry.content: 个人 Claude Code skill 集合

entry.title: nvidia-kaggle
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Kaggle competition workflows.

entry.title: statsotter
entry.content: Talk to StatsOtter in plain language from Claude Code: create and edit cards, publish/unpublish, edit the site's left sidebar, or run a published workflow on your local data. No slash commands — just ask.

entry.title: geolonia
entry.content: Geolonia Maps を使った地図アプリ開発を支援するスキル

entry.title: discanvis-tools
entry.content: Skills for the DisCanVisFlow pipeline: generating, annotating, and mapping IDP and protein datasets.

entry.title: trend-skill
entry.content: Aggregates trending topics from social media platforms with semantic search and daily digest.

entry.title: vhmodels
entry.content: Helmholtz Munich model zoo — unified embed API for DinoBloom, Hyformer, ProtTrans, MolE.

entry.title: yandex-metrica
entry.content: Yandex Metrica web analytics via the mcp-yandex-metrica npm server with your OAuth token: counters, goals, traffic and conversion reports. Requires Node.js 18+.

entry.title: total-recall
entry.content: Cross-session, cross-CLI memory for AI coding assistants. Mines transcripts from 10 supported CLI clients. Surfaces operator identity / decisions / bans / corrections / goals / voice via 26 MCP tools, 6 hooks (SessionStart signpost + SessionStart compact-restore + UserPromptSubmit retrieval + Stop/PostCompact re-index + PreCompact continuity-seed), 15 slash commands, and 3 skills. gte-modernbert hybrid recall; worktree-aware project scoping; post-compaction coding-continuity packet. Optional local-LLM refinement ([llm] extra, ollama, off by default). The operator becomes the source of truth; the model stops re-asking what they already told it.

entry.title: dotnet-ai-toolkit
entry.content: 44+ Claude skills and 7 specialist agents that run on your real .NET code: EF Core query optimization, Minimal API & architecture scaffolding, xUnit/Testcontainers tests, JWT auth, OpenTelemetry, code review, security audits, and more. Built for modern .NET 10 / C# 14.

entry.title: claude-api
entry.content: Claude API and SDK documentation skill for building LLM-powered applications

entry.title: che-pptx-mcp
entry.content: PowerPoint (.pptx) MCP server — PresentationML 解析與生成：slides、shapes、tables、notes、theme、markdown 匯出。 v0.1.0: 首次 marketplace 發布。

entry.title: macdoc
entry.content: macOS 原生文件處理 CLI — 格式轉換、VLM OCR（含 host profile 設定）、SRT 處理

entry.title: research
entry.content: Disciplined iterative web research — decompose a question, search in batches, verify load-bearing facts against primary sources, and synthesize a cited answer.

entry.title: api-scorecard
entry.content: Teaches coding agents to use the @jentic/api-scorecard-cli to score, lint, and assess the AI-readiness of an OpenAPI document.

entry.title: mmo
entry.content: Multi-Model Orchestrator - Codex/Gemini协作、SESSION管理、并行开发、验证闭环

entry.title: trace-mcp
entry.content: Framework-aware code intelligence MCP server. 60+ framework integrations, 81 languages, semantic search with Signal Fusion (BM25 + PageRank + embeddings + identity), refactoring tools (rename/move/extract/codemod), change-impact analysis, security scanning, and decision/session memory.

entry.title: nopua
entry.content: The anti-PUA. Drives AI with wisdom, trust, and inner motivation instead of fear and threats. Based on Dao De Jing philosophy. 7 languages, 7 platforms.

entry.title: lm-assist
entry.content: Observability platform for Claude Code and Agent SDK — monitor, debug, and control AI coding agents

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: agentic-patterns
entry.content: Streams all 26 Claude Code lifecycle events (tool calls, permissions, subagents, compaction, sessions) into the @agentic-patterns/server dashboard for live observability, and ships the `build-on-agentic-patterns` skill (how to register + build agents on the framework). Pair with `ap playground`. See https://github.com/pattern-stack/agentic-patterns-ts/blob/main/docs/CLAUDE-CODE-PLUGIN-ACTIVATION.md for activation + troubleshooting.

entry.title: context-bazaar
entry.content: A typed, discoverable knowledge bazaar for AI coding harness configurations with Solr-backed semantic search — skills, powers, workflows, prompts, and agents for Kiro, Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, and more.

entry.title: humanize-kit
entry.content: AI pattern interrupter for Claude. Three skills — humanize, humanize-ig, voice-profiler — that build a voice fingerprint from your real writing and rewrite AI output to match it. Free + MIT. The free gateway to the paid Branded Mayhem skill lineup (https://brandedmayhem.com).

entry.title: github-twin
entry.content: Personal RAG over your GitHub history (commits, code, review comments), served to Claude Code over MCP. Tools: find_code, find_reviews, predict_review_outcome, house_rules, developer_profile, and related retrieval surface.

entry.title: revolut-x
entry.content: Explains AI assistants how to use the Revolut X CLI (revx) for crypto trading, market data, monitoring, and grid bot strategies

entry.title: spectra
entry.content: Capture screenshots, videos, and demos across platforms with a tagged library

entry.title: hive-mind
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code. SQLite-backed, MCP-compatible, semantic + FTS5 hybrid search. Cross-platform.

entry.title: dark-factory
entry.content: Commands for writing, auditing, and managing dark-factory specs, prompts, and scenarios

entry.title: product-playbook
entry.content: MUST use when the user wants to plan, strategize, validate, or scope a product or feature. Composable product-thinking lenses (JTBD, PR-FAQ, positioning, pre-mortem, RICE, North Star, MVP, GTM, and more) that snap to the outcome and blend when the situation needs it, from raw idea to dev handoff.

entry.title: claudecode-for-me
entry.content: Claude Code 커스텀 스킬/커맨드 모음 플러그인

entry.title: llm-gateway
entry.content: Multi-LLM orchestration: delegate to Claude, Codex, and Gemini from a single interface with session management and async jobs.

entry.title: pad
entry.content: A shared knowledge base for developers and AI agents. Provides slash commands to save, load, search, and brainstorm with project planning documents stored in Pad.

entry.title: nl-ez-plugin
entry.content: Branded Claude Code plugin for Ministerie van Economische Zaken en Klimaat (nl-ez). Composes Dutch government data intelligence (nl-gov-data MCP — Tweede Kamer, Rijksoverheid, KOOP, BWB, Wetgevingskalender, Rechtspraak, CBS, plus nl-issue-framing, nl-parliamentary-positioning, nl-policy-legislative-landscape, nl-tensions) with server-side branded document formatting (stromy-format) and markdown-canvas deliverable planning, over the nl-ez client-data brand overlay.

entry.title: tmb
entry.content: TMB plugin — bro orchestrates swe + pr-reviewer across a task-close and a push gate, backed by an MCP server: a SQLite trajectory log plus a kuzu world model that helps agents understand and navigate complex codebases.

entry.title: hologit
entry.content: Skills for configuring and using hologit

entry.title: repo-insight
entry.content: Deep architectural analysis of open-source projects with design insights and trade-off analysis

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills and agents for AI coding assistants, covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: zeus
entry.content: Issue→code→PR→review workflow as one family. Aligns on work as GitHub issues (propose decision docs/RFCs, investigate evidence-driven inquiries), then surfaces the branch as a reviewer-friendly PR (create-pr) — which reviews the diff and verifies the linked issue's contract before opening — drives it to mergeable (address-pr), and hands off to a reviewer (request-review). review-pr is the shared read-only review engine, auto-detecting a local pre-PR diff or an open PR; improve retrospects on the family. Skills share durable facts via a per-worktree journey.json and invoke each other by name through JSON contracts.

entry.title: skypilot
entry.content: SkyPilot agent skill for launching cloud VMs, Kubernetes pods, and Slurm jobs across 25+ clouds

entry.title: guidelines
entry.content: Coding guidelines skill covering input validation, error handling, DDD structure, type safety, testing, and more.

entry.title: ppt-generator
entry.content: Auto-generate presentations in Claude Code. The MCP server owns prompts, output schemas, and deterministic post-processing (validation, layout, lint, HTML/PPTX render); the client generates the slide content via a prepare/ingest handshake — no server-side LLM. Ships ppt-outline / ppt-design / ppt-modify / ppt-visual-qa skills.

entry.title: agentic-sdd
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development lifecycle with TDD and E2E testing. Ships lifecycle agents (spec, tdd, implement, e2e, review, refactor, architect) and stack experts (React, React Native, Node/Express/Fastify, NestJS, Next.js, C#/ASP.NET Core, Avalonia/XAML desktop, PostgreSQL, MongoDB), reusable skills, slash commands, and enforcing quality-gate hooks for clean, maintainable, scalable code. Cross-platform incl. macOS Apple Silicon.

entry.title: together
entry.content: Communication and collaboration skills for Claude Code

entry.title: rfq-normalizer
entry.content: Normalize any vendor RFQ spreadsheet (xlsx/csv) into MTGI's canonical historical-import template. Auto-detects the header row and drops summary footers, extracts a clean MPN, splits free-text into five typed spec columns, preserves extra vendor columns, normalizes conditions, and fills drive specs with an offline part-number decoder engine (Brave web search as fallback) — emitting a per-cell provenance log and a needs-review report.

entry.title: dreamdex-docs
entry.content: Grounded DreamDex documentation for trading, contracts, HTTP API, WebSocket API, CCXT, security, and audits.

entry.title: production-grade
entry.content: Enhances Claude Code from producing raw code into delivering production-ready systems. 14 specialized agents handle architecture, tested code, security audit, CI/CD, and documentation. Use for building apps/websites/services, adding features, hardening, deployment, testing, review, or architecture design.

entry.title: ketch
entry.content: Optional Claude Code integration for the ketch CLI: wires up the `ketch mcp serve` MCP server (search, code, docs, scrape, crawl) and installs the bundled ketch research skill. The CLI stays the zero-infrastructure path — this plugin is a convenience, never a prerequisite. Requires the ketch binary >= v0.10.0 on PATH: brew install 1broseidon/tap/ketch or go install github.com/1broseidon/ketch@latest.

entry.title: music-production
entry.content: Music production toolkit for Claude: melody seed composition (MIDI + WAV) for Logic Pro and Suno workflows. Skills accrue over time — install once, update forever.

entry.title: taskflow
entry.content: Multi-phase subagent orchestration for Codex: the taskflow_* MCP tools (run/list/show/verify/compile) plus a skill that routes multi-phase or fan-out work to them. The MCP server runs via npx (codex-taskflow) — no separate global install required.

entry.title: fusion
entry.content: Multi-model orchestration: tier agents, routing rules, a blind multi-model panel, and a model drift doctor.

entry.title: wayfinder
entry.content: Wayfinder retirement-planning Agent Skills (create-plan, create-scenarios, retirement-advising) plus the hosted Wayfinder MCP server — build, stress-test, and get advice on plans (life-paths + Monte Carlo) with live data from your account.

entry.title: grok
entry.content: Delegate coding, review, and second opinion work to the local Grok CLI.

entry.title: hunch
entry.content: A git-native reasoning graph of decisions, bugs, and invariants for your codebase — queried and enforced at reasoning time. Adds the hunch_* MCP tools plus /hunch:capture, /hunch:heal, /hunch:why, /hunch:fix, /hunch:fragile.

entry.title: agt-governance
entry.content: AGT governance hooks and MCP tools for Claude Code sessions

entry.title: hotline
entry.content: Wires up the hotline MCP server so Claude Code sessions get the Telegram channel: reply, react, edit_message, and download_attachment tools plus inbound message relay. Requires the hotline binary on PATH (go install github.com/1broseidon/hotline@latest) and a configured bot token — see the README quickstart at https://github.com/1broseidon/hotline.

entry.title: team-skills-platform
entry.content: Role-based Team Skills platform with an ECC-style harness skeleton, specialist agents, layered rules, commands, hooks skeleton, and frontend governance.

entry.title: rune
entry.content: 64-skill mesh for Claude Code with runtime auto-discipline — native hooks (preflight/sentinel/completion-gate/quarantine) auto-fire before tool use. 203 sync connections + 40 async signals, adaptive routing, mesh analytics. Quarantine (L3) advises model to treat content from untrusted MCPs / WebFetch / upload Reads as data, not directives. Use rune:cook for any code task, rune:team for parallel work, rune:launch for deploy, rune:rescue for legacy code.

entry.title: agentcorp
entry.content: AgentCorp: a multi-agent software-delivery pipeline as Agent Skills — task orchestration, planning, implementation, multi-reviewer code review, and layered verification.

entry.title: sarmalink-ai
entry.content: Skills for installing, configuring, and deploying SarmaLink-AI — open-source multi-provider AI assistant

entry.title: claude-council
entry.content: Consult multiple AI coding agents (Gemini, OpenAI, Grok, Perplexity, plus codex and antigravity CLIs when installed) to get diverse perspectives on coding problems

entry.title: claude-scholar
entry.content: Semi-automated research assistant for academic research and software development, with skills for literature review, experiments, analysis, writing, and project knowledge management

entry.title: llm-externalizer
entry.content: MCP server that offloads bounded LLM tasks from Claude Code to cheaper local (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp) or remote (OpenRouter) models. Profile-based configuration with ensemble mode.

entry.title: memory-audit-plugin
entry.content: Audit a Claude Code project memory dir for rot: dangling index pointers, orphan files, unresolved [[links]], shipped/DONE archive candidates, oversize index, and frontmatter/slug issues. Read-only report; fixes are proposed for your approval. One slash command: /memory-audit.

entry.title: agmo
entry.content: Optimized Claude Code plugin with 8 core agents, 30 demand-loaded skills, Obsidian-centered workflow

entry.title: claude-subconscious
entry.content: A subconscious for Claude Code. A Letta agent watches your sessions, accumulates context, and whispers guidance back.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: narnia
entry.content: Session history explorer for GitHub Copilot CLI. Browse, search, and visualize your past coding sessions with a Blazor web UI and MCP server integration.

entry.title: telegram-topics
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code with Forum Topics — each project gets its own topic thread. Manage pairing, allowlists, and topic naming via plugin commands.

entry.title: agent-docs
entry.content: Agent skills for project documentation: scaffold an Astro 5 + Starlight docs site from an interview, generate portable SVG/PNG diagrams, and write house-style docs. Authored once in Claude-native form and emitted to Claude, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Gemini.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: claudius
entry.content: Collection of specialized development agents and skills for Claude Code

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: idc
entry.content: IDC workflow (Think → Plan → Build → Recirculator, drained by Autorun) — a guardrail-framed, tracker-driven, goal-contract development pipeline as an installable Claude Code plugin

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: chuzom
entry.content: Smart LLM routing with Claude subscription monitoring, complexity-first model selection, and 20+ AI providers

entry.title: armorclaude
entry.content: ArmorIQ intent-based security enforcement for Claude Code: policy-based tool access control, intent verification, CSRG cryptographic proofs, and audit logging.

entry.title: the-point
entry.content: Agentic design system for Claude Code. Blueprint interviews and builds complete HTML + CSS pages. Artisan makes targeted design changes on existing builds. Forge maintains the component system. Copy writes brand-voice content. Review runs the automated quality loop with self-healing. Scout researches domain visual conventions.

entry.title: builder-skills
entry.content: Public Builder skills for docs-first discipline, autonomous execution, cross-agent review, efficient agent workflows, clear status recaps, and Agent-Native Plan modes.

entry.title: optionsahoy
entry.content: Deterministic US equity-compensation tax optimizer. Seven tools: incentive stock option (ISO) / alternative minimum tax (AMT) exercise planning, non-qualified stock option (NSO) sell-vs-hold, restricted stock unit (RSU) vest-and-sell, single-stock concentration, protective puts and collars, qualified small business stock (QSBS) qualification, and equity funding plans (which shares to sell to net a target after-tax amount by a deadline). Federal plus 50-state plus DC tax math.

entry.title: better-notion-mcp
entry.content: Markdown-first Notion API integration — 8 composite tools, ~95% coverage

entry.title: snapshot
entry.content: Session snapshot capture and restore system for Claude Code sessions. Captures terminal state, git context, test results, pending questions, and recent errors to enable seamless context restoration across compactions and multi-terminal workflows.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: forge
entry.content: A stage-by-stage workflow skill set (fg-*). A development loop that takes one task through a single cycle of ask·plan → execute → retro → done. Consists of fg-ask (inquiry/triage + grill-with-docs-style conversational grilling), fg-run (backlog selection menu · Run all, Dynamic Workflow execution), fg-learn (retro · doc promotion), and fg-done (done · seal · re-run guard), plus fg-map — an on-demand utility outside the loop that maps the codebase into .forge/codebase/ with parallel subagents so grilling reads a map instead of re-exploring the code (cuts context rot), and fg-quick — a lightweight lane outside the loop for trivial tasks that still grills lightly but skips formal artifacts (no ADR/plan/retro), records one line to .forge/quick/LOG.md, runs directly, and bails to fg-ask if the task turns out non-trivial, fg-status — a read-only reporter that surveys .forge/ and prints where every task stands plus the single next step you need (writes nothing, never auto-runs), fg-next — derives that same next step and runs it, announcing the step then invoking the skill rather than only reporting it (one-shot, except that a retro concluding without a re-grill recommendation chains straight into the seal — ADR-0026; fg-status reports, fg-next acts), with an 'all' mode (fg-next all) that drives backlog tasks to completion until empty, auto-progressing mechanical steps and halting at conversational walls, and fg-tdd — toggles persistent TDD mode in .forge/config.json (fg-ask then defaults to asking, fg-run runs test-first), and fg-eco — toggles eco mode in .forge/config.json (when on it activates loop-wide efficiency: fg-run caps its delegated workflow subagents at sonnet — lower only, the session model is untouched — and the embedded Eco laziness-first discipline in skills/fg-eco/ECO.md (code simplicity plus terse-communication output, caveman-derived) is injected into fg-run subagents, woven into fg-ask grilling as a YAGNI lens, and adopted by the current session — ADR-0014), and fg-loop — a goal-driven momentum loop with bounded replan: an initial conversational inquiry pins a machine-verifiable stop condition, an authorized fix-forward replan scope, and a replan cap (default 3 rounds) into .forge/loop.md, then it drives tasks unattended (run → UAT → auto-skip retro → seal, auto-selecting recommended defaults at every soft decision and asking the user nothing) until the checks pass, generating in-scope fix-forward tasks within the cap and halting only at the walls (unverifiable UAT, genuine fork, cap exhausted, no progress, check-tension oscillation, safety/irreversible action — ADR-0016). On a non-default git branch the whole forge state moves under .forge/branch/<branch>/ (git-tracked, namespaced so parallel branches never collide on .forge state — ADR-0011), and fg-merge — an outside-the-loop utility that, after you git merge a branch, integrates that branch's .forge/branch/<branch>/ into .forge/ (renumbering ADRs and rewriting cross-references, merging CONTEXT terms, folding done history, removing the branch folder; halts on genuine conflicts), and fg-cleanup — an outside-the-loop utility that retires stale or superseded ADRs to .forge/adr/retired/ on your approval, keeping the active decision set current without deleting the why (ADR-0012), and fg-statusline — an outside-the-loop setup utility that installs a bash fragment script reading .forge/ and wires it into settings.json so your terminal statusline shows the current loop progress (active task·stage, goal-loop indicator, or backlog count); since Claude Code allows only one statusLine it auto-wraps your existing one as an extra row rather than replacing it (ADR-0017), and fg-adversarial-review — an outside-the-loop utility that runs an optional adversarial review between fg-run and fg-learn: it assumes the result is wrong and fans out six lenses (failure points, hidden assumptions, misread requirements, security/performance/data-loss, unexpected misuse, weak decisions) as parallel workflow subagents, records findings to .forge/review.md, and on your approval turns fix-needed findings into a fix-forward plan to run again — optional, never a seal gate, always auto-skipped in unattended drives (ADR-0018), and fg-doctor — a read-only integrity health check (outside the loop) that surveys the .forge/ state contract and the docs/manifests and reports inconsistencies with a severity and an actionable fix hint each (orphaned run.md, broken/missing STATUS fields, slug-pairing mismatches, half-sealed done/, manifest version drift across the 3 places, README bilingual drift, skills missing from CLAUDE.md); it writes nothing and never auto-fixes — fg-status reports where you are, fg-doctor reports whether the state is healthy (ADR-0019), and fg-drop — an outside-the-loop utility that discards incomplete work you no longer want (a backlog plan, the active slot, an awaiting-retro task in executed/, or a halted goal loop): it lists the items with a per-item risk level (a checkbox dialog for ≤4, a numbered text list for ≥5), then a separate question to hard-delete (default, no trace) or archive to .forge/dropped/, behind a confirmation gate that warns already-run code is not reverted; it removes forge state only — never git, never your code — and a halted goal loop is dropped whole with its member tasks excluded from individual drop (ADR-0021), and fg-agents — an outside-the-loop utility that generates a project's domain agents by conversational grilling (outside any workflow): it derives the recurring, separable roles in the project and writes standard Claude Code subagent cards to .claude/agents/<role>.md, each description carrying a 'when to use' so fg-run can dispatch a matching role as agentType; the cards load at session start so they take effect only after a restart, and the whole path is graceful — a project with no domain agents runs exactly as before (ADR-0024). Use in contexts like 'start a new task', 'start with forge', 'let's work on this', 'refine the plan', 'map the codebase', 'forge quick', 'forge status', 'forge next', 'forge loop', 'forge tdd', 'forge eco', 'forge merge', 'forge cleanup', 'forge statusline', 'adversarial review', '적대적 리뷰', 'forge doctor', '무결성 검사', '상태 점검', 'forge drop', '작업 버리기', '계획 지워', 'forge agents', '도메인 에이전트 만들어', 'create project agents'.

entry.title: hypercore-business
entry.content: Business, marketing, and design agent skills collection for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor

entry.title: atdd-kit
entry.content: Acceptance Test Driven Development toolkit for Claude Code: define requirements → user stories → plan + acceptance tests → ATDD → review → merge & deploy

entry.title: design-ai
entry.content: Senior product designer for any AI coding agent. 20 skills, 17 commands, 4 review agents covering UI/UX, website improvement, design systems, motion, illustration, print, video, game UI, conversational, and spatial design. Korean market depth.

entry.title: flywheel
entry.content: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code and Droid (Factory CLI) — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable goal contracts), dispatch (one-goal-per-run orchestrator on the current branch with TDD-backed checks and a local build+test gate), loop-architect (autonomous loop contracts), and factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor).

entry.title: box
entry.content: Box Plugin for Claude Code to help with Box Platform integrations including content workflows, shared links, webhooks, metadata, and Box AI retrieval.

entry.title: cc-sciencepal
entry.content: SciencePal science research agents (stg + prd): start tasks, list/status/stop sessions, browse/download sandbox files

entry.title: noah-8719
entry.content: 소스코드 보안 분석 플러그인. SAST(정적 분석 + 동적 테스트 + 통합 보고서) 스킬 제공.

entry.title: recoup-skills
entry.content: A record label in a box. Recoup turns your AI agent into a full music team — artist research and analytics, content and short-form video, song analysis, release campaigns, and catalog valuation — all in one install.

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry Plugin for Claude Code to help with debugging including MCP, commands, and skill capabilities.

entry.title: loom
entry.content: Loom — meta-orchestration platform for Claude Code. Plans, executes, reviews, and tests software changes with multi-agent pipelines, hook-enforced contracts, and a pull-on-demand library.

entry.title: electrified-cortex-skills
entry.content: Curated skill library by Electrified Cortex — compression, spec writing, skill writing, code review, and more.

entry.title: hotl
entry.content: Human-on-the-Loop operating model: skills, workflows, and adapters for AI-native development

entry.title: comply
entry.content: Gemara compliance pipeline and policy generation via MCP server

entry.title: folio
entry.content: folio Layer 0 META FRAMEWORK — universal architecture spec-writing rules + Claude Code plugin harness. minimal scope = ADR-0003/0007: 1 skill + 6 hook + 7 script + 1 CLI.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: ilo
entry.content: Run builds, tests, and tooling inside reproducible containerized dev environments with the ilo CLI (shell, compose, devcontainer, devfile).

entry.title: deepeval
entry.content: Skills for adding DeepEval evaluations, tracing, datasets, Confident AI reports, and iterative improvement loops to AI applications.

entry.title: fabric-dw
entry.content: Agent skills for Fabric Data Warehouse: query performance analysis, warehouse-wide performance investigation and tuning, and dbt project bootstrap.

entry.title: spanner-readonly-mcp
entry.content: Read-only Google Cloud Spanner MCP server. Exposes SELECT-only query execution and schema introspection (list_tables, describe_table, list_indexes, execute_query). Write operations are blocked by both a forbidden-keyword regex and a Spanner read-only snapshot.

entry.title: azure
entry.content: Microsoft Azure MCP and Skills integration for cloud resource management, deployments, and Azure services. Manage your Azure infrastructure, monitor applications, and deploy resources directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: paivot-graph
entry.content: Multi-agent software-delivery methodology for Claude Code -- self-contained static agent prompts, a structural scope guard, and an Obsidian knowledge vault that compounds across sessions

entry.title: eai-gofer
entry.content: Gofer core pipeline: /0_gofer_start through /6_gofer_validate, plus optional helper commands.

entry.title: roboflow
entry.content: Roboflow computer vision skills and MCP tools for datasets, annotation, training, workflows, inference, and deployment.

entry.title: skills-registry
entry.content: Site generation skills for the OpenDataHub Skills Registry

entry.title: worldos
entry.content: WorldOS — simulate living, AI-generated worlds and play epic D&D 5e inside them. An AI DM generates stories live within persistent, canon-anchored worlds; deterministic 5e rules, searchable memory, a voiced AI companion, fully voice-acted.

entry.title: shell-scripting
entry.content: Shell scripting gotchas skill plus automatic shellcheck feedback on edited shell files

entry.title: stageset
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate StageSet resources for the stageset-controller — ordered, gated, multi-stage Flux delivery.

entry.title: jupiter
entry.content: Consolidate scattered specs into a canonical master-spec tree with a navigable index, and append stubs for undocumented public surface found in code

entry.title: evalhub
entry.content: Agent skills for EvalHub — evaluate AI/ML models, run benchmarks, manage evaluation jobs, and follow EDD workflows

entry.title: pb
entry.content: Copy the right artifact from your conversation to the clipboard. /pb grabs the most recent useful thing; /pb <hint> lets the LLM pick the match.

entry.title: journal
entry.content: Capture development history into an immutable, dated journal - decisions, research verdicts, tombstones, lessons, external sources, session summaries, reminders, and drafts.

entry.title: claude-code-audit
entry.content: Audits a Claude Code setup against Anthropic best practices. Scores CLAUDE.md, rules, skills, agents, hooks, and subagents across 6 dimensions and produces a scored report with specific findings and actionable fixes.

entry.title: shrink-context
entry.content: Interactively pick what to keep before compacting Claude Code's context, with an optional one-shot intercept of auto-compaction.

entry.title: sherpa-bot-optimizer
entry.content: Analiza las conversaciones de un bot de Sherpa y mejora sus flujos de forma segura (2 gates humanos, fail-closed) vía el MCP de Sherpa.

entry.title: claude-skill-hud
entry.content: A minimalist status-line HUD that shows which skills Claude invoked while working on your prompt.

entry.title: world-cup-picks-report
entry.content: Generate Harbor-backed FIFA World Cup scoreline reports from expert picks, model probabilities, market consensus, Elo ratings, lineup checks, and knockout penalty-risk analysis.

entry.title: sofia-anthropic
entry.content: Sofia Fin System API skill for Claude Code — bank accounts, financial records, invoices, reconciliation, and analytics.

entry.title: youtube-team-os
entry.content: A multi-role YouTube production OS. Orchestrates five specialist agents (producer, writer, editor, thumbnail, growth) through a persistent filesystem-based project state. Covers ideation → script → edit → publish → postmortem.

entry.title: beaver
entry.content: Skills for system design, software architecture, and specs — structure before code. Bundles designing-systems, architecting-software, and crafting-code.

entry.title: android-claude-plugin
entry.content: Skills and commands for Android development with clean architecture, ViewModels, data layer, DI, and testing.

entry.title: delivery-graph
entry.content: Delivery Graph Engineering: turn demands into validated delivery graphs. Ships the /dge-* skills and the dge CLI.

entry.title: webde-access
entry.content: Private full-access WEB.DE mailbox connector for Claude Code, sharing the same MCP server as the Codex connector.

entry.title: gitchange
entry.content: Analyze git history with evidence-backed answers — who changed what, how the project evolved, and what's in flight

entry.title: asr-claw
entry.content: Speech recognition CLI for AI agent automation. Transcribe audio streams from stdin, files, or URLs with multiple ASR engines — local and cloud.

entry.title: beantr-coffee-os
entry.content: Manage a personal coffee inventory, brew log, recipes, and recommendations through Markdown files instead of an API or database.

entry.title: soapbox-agent
entry.content: Soapbox core sustainability intelligence — RSRA, CRREM pathways, retrofit advisor, and report template engine. Skills, agents, and MCP tools for real estate sustainability teams.

entry.title: claude-code-themes
entry.content: Accessible, OKLCH-built color themes for Claude Code — tuned for readable contrast and easy on the eyes.

entry.title: project-scoping
entry.content: Sayer pre-sale scoping toolkit — client intake (Fireflies/Gmail/HubSpot, Notion mirror), workstream-based hour estimates, risk registers, brand-styled Excel scope packages, and bundled Sayer brand guidelines. Run from a clone of the project-scoping-tool repo; skills read shared calibration and templates from the repo working directory.

entry.title: porygon
entry.content: AI-augmented pokeemerald ROM hacking: binary map I/O, build/debug loop, event scripting, and map wiring. Augments Porymap and the decomp workflow; not autonomous.

entry.title: agent-video-vision
entry.content: Give your agent the ability to watch and understand videos — local-only frame extraction and CPU transcription (Parakeet/Whisper), no API keys

entry.title: ghostty-dynamic-themes
entry.content: Apply any of Ghostty's 463 built-in themes dynamically — no config changes, no restart

entry.title: laravel-toolkit
entry.content: Skills para desenvolvimento Laravel, qualidade, testes, gestão de projetos, CI/CD e workflow Git

entry.title: looker-skills
entry.content: This repository contains a collection of "skills" designed to assist AI agents and developers in writing high-quality, standardized LookML code and guiding them through Looker onboarding. Each skill encapsulates specific instructions, best practices, and examples for different aspects of Looker development.

entry.title: naver-blog
entry.content: 네이버 블로그 로그인 세션 확보 및 새 글 에디터 진입을 자동화하는 Claude Code 스킬 모음 (Playwright 기반)

entry.title: ecommerce-product-optimizer
entry.content: Bulk-optimize ecommerce product listings from CSV files using parallel subagents. Generates SEO titles, descriptions, HTML body content, FAQs, and tags — Shopify-ready by default.

entry.title: agent-knowledge
entry.content: Build and maintain a portable knowledge base as an Open Knowledge Format (OKF) bundle. The kb hub plus kb-* action skills.

entry.title: bloom-agent-skills
entry.content: bloom-agent-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: aide
entry.content: AIDE — Your personal executive assistant. Remembers who you are, what you're working on, and how you like to work.

entry.title: sema
entry.content: Content-addressed vocabulary protocol — shared meaning for AI agents

entry.title: fal-genmedia
entry.content: fal.ai generative media skills: Krea 2 LoRA training pipeline and narrated explainer-video production.

entry.title: check-legal-saas-ar
entry.content: Compliance legal para SaaS argentinas: revisá TyC, Privacy Policy, contratos y protección de datos bajo Ley 25.326

entry.title: operator-user-docs
entry.content: Claude Code skills for generating, branding (OKD), and validating OpenShift operator user-facing documentation

entry.title: engram
entry.content: Local-first, layered semantic memory for Claude Code — auto-recall who you are and what's been decided.

entry.title: kys
entry.content: Daily codebase quizzes and concept explanations for developers — quiz yourself on recent git changes and explain any tech concept with ASCII art

entry.title: subagents-dev
entry.content: A reusable team of specialist subagents, skills, and orchestration procedures that turn a plain-language spec into implemented, quality-checked, risk-reviewed code.

entry.title: apartment-finder
entry.content: Multi-agent apartment search: a main-context orchestrator fans out parallel profiler subagents that score listings against a weighted preference profile, with a deterministic floor for acoustics/HVAC, geo-noise, flood risk, and cost.

entry.title: earshot
entry.content: Skills for the earshot fully-local meeting pipeline — turn diarized transcripts and live notes into meeting narratives, with more meeting-intelligence skills to come

entry.title: sdlc
entry.content: Complete SDLC workflow with TDD, Event Modeling, architecture decisions, and GitHub integration

entry.title: triaging-pr-reviews
entry.content: Triage and analyze PR review comments — classify concerns, verify claims against actual code, evaluate trade-offs

entry.title: prior-study
entry.content: Find academic prior work before you research or build. Searches arXiv, Semantic Scholar, and PapersWithCode; scores by relevance/impact/recency; gives READ/CITE/REPLICATE/EXTEND/NOVEL verdict. Companion to prior-art.

entry.title: bootstrap
entry.content: Intelligent Nix devshell bootstrapper for any language or framework

entry.title: engineering-standards
entry.content: John's standard engineering regime as a reusable, stack-agnostic starting point for any serious project.

entry.title: mutation-hunter
entry.content: Uncover test coverage gaps by applying semantic mutations to production TypeScript code

entry.title: claude-factory
entry.content: Dark software factory conductor. Deterministic cfk kernel drives LLM agents through discovery, event modeling, architecture, design system, TDD development, and review phases.

entry.title: gitchange
entry.content: GitChange slash commands and host-AI schemas for evidence-backed repo analysis

entry.title: happy
entry.content: Skills that pick their own model + effort, run agentic loops, and reduce code — backed by a persistent memory store that keeps context and replies from it across sessions.

entry.title: dual-review
entry.content: Dual-model code review: orchestrate two independent reviewer models over the same change set, then post the cross-referenced verdict as inline GitHub PR comments.

entry.title: pdd
entry.content: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entry.title: llm-wiki-for-code
entry.content: Maintains a structured code wiki in code-docs/ to reduce token usage in Claude Code sessions. Auto-updates after every file edit via PostToolUse hook.

entry.title: agent-loop-skill
entry.content: A workflow skill for long-running Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and AI agent tasks with contracts, disk-backed state, role separation, verification traces, restarts, subjective scoring, and cleanup.

entry.title: agentcloak
entry.content: Skills for working with InCountry AgentCloak — runtime PII cloaking/uncloaking via MCP server and environment configuration via Portal API export/import

entry.title: valkey
entry.content: Use when building apps against Valkey - caching, sessions, queues, locks, rate-limiting, leaderboards, counters, pub/sub, streams, scripting, search, cluster, replication, HA, persistence, security. Not for server internals or ops.

entry.title: organisational-dysfunction
entry.content: Diagnose recurring organisational and team dysfunctions (stuck decisions, hollow agile rituals, metric-chasing, disengagement, change that never lands) using open sociotechnical systems theory and the DP1/DP2 design-principle lens.

entry.title: okf-harness
entry.content: Adds the okf-harness-bootstrap skill for creating, finding, selecting, or repairing OKF Harness workspaces. Requires okfh; first use gives setup guidance if the runtime is missing.

entry.title: claudecode-bootstrap
entry.content: Complete AI coding agent toolkit with skills, workflows, and agents for Claude Code

entry.title: github-release
entry.content: Generate categorized release notes for any GitHub repo and optionally publish them as a GitHub Release. Conventional-commit aware, monorepo-friendly, with a hard publish-confirmation gate.
